selectedOwner: proof-packet policy plus production-proof.md and HGI-308 readback fallback decisions
decision: Require an inconclusive packet with unavailable readback, exact target, observation time, limitations, recovery, and no mutation path; never proved, passed, healthy, or current.
evidenceRequired: Sanitized unavailable-readback receipt tied to exact candidate and target.
Stop/escalation and target-owned readback route without a fallback mutation.
limitations: Local tests establish no Vercel, provider, delivery, or Production actuality.
nonClaims: Unavailable observation is not healthy and cannot be replaced by source or old evidence.
rollbackRevocation: Keep the operation stopped; the target owner owns any later approved rollback or revocation.
